# Instantly — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | △ | 450M+ B2B contact database; basic search filters; weaker ICP filter depth vs. Apollo |
| [[email-verification]] | △ | Inline verification included; not a standalone verifier product |
| [[email-warmup]] | ✓ | 4.2M+ account private network; Premium (Blue Flame) pool of aged Google/Microsoft accounts; unlimited warm-up on all plans |
| [[personalisation]] | △ | AI Copilot for sequence writing; spintax on higher tiers; dynamic variables; limited vs. Lemlist |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | ✓ | A/Z testing up to 26 variants; SISR (dedicated IP sharding/rotation) on Light Speed; unlimited email accounts; Calendly AI booking detection |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | ✓ | Unibox pulls 1,000+ inboxes; AI Reply Agent with Autopilot mode; Slack routing; objection handling |

## Vendor Type
Deliverability-first cold email platform. Best-in-class for high-volume senders (100K+/month) on a flat-fee model.

## Best For
High-volume cold email senders (agencies, SDR teams) who prioritise inbox placement and want unlimited email accounts on a flat subscription. Industry-leading warm-up network.

## Limitations
- Email-only outbound — no native LinkedIn or calling steps in sequences
- AI personalisation less advanced than Lemlist (no visual/video personalisation)
- Prospecting database filters are basic vs. Apollo's 65+ filters
- No built-in CRM — relies on integrations
